items.title: M3 Expressive Redesign
items.description: Redesigned the entire app with Material 3 Expressive components and smooth spring animations.

items.title: Dynamic Credits & Changelog
items.description: Moved credits and changelog to separate modules with remote JSON support.

items.title: Smooth Checklist Reordering
items.description: Fixed glitches when reordering checklist items using new animateItem modifier.

items.title: Adaptive Bin Screen
items.description: Fixed white flashes in the bin screen with proper theme-adaptive background colors.
